events.event_description: First U.S. diplomatic presence established in Paraguay when Charles Ames Washburn presented credentials as Commissioner.

evidence.quote: Charles Ames Washburn, Commissioner. Appointed: 1861-06-08. Credentials presented: 1861-11-26. Promoted to Minister Resident 1863-05-13.

events.event_description: Mission elevated to Legation when Washburn was promoted from Commissioner to Minister Resident.

evidence.quote:
Charles Ames Washburn, Commissioner. Appointed: 1861-06-08. Credentials presented: 1861-11-26. Promoted to Minister Resident 1863-05-13.

Charles Ames Washburn, Minister Resident. Appointed: 1863-01-19. Credentials presented: 1863-05-13.

events.event_description: Mission elevated from Legation to Embassy when Wesley Frost was promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote:
Wesley Frost, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1941-03-20. Credentials presented: 1941-04-30. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1942-04-15.

Wesley Frost, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1942-03-05. Credentials presented: 1942-04-15.
